stemHtml: A pilot flying a VFR flight got lost while in contact with ATC and with enough fuel in tanks. What are the recommended actions in this case?

options.a: Note the actual time and ask ATC for help.
options.b: Make an urgency call (PAN PAN) on frequency 121.5 MHz.
options.c: Turn back to the last confirmed position.
options.d: Continue the flight with the same heading until the position can be established.
